title: Mentoring for Careers in Physics - Green Space Renovation
description: A short campaign video introducing MCP's green space renovation initiative and the student-centered support behind the project.

title: Mentoring for Careers in Physics 2024-2025
description: A program overview video for the 2024-2025 MCP year, highlighting the purpose and community behind mentoring at William & Mary.

title: MCP Fall Kickoff Video
description: Highlights from an MCP kickoff event show students, mentors, and faculty coming together around practical career conversations, community, and futures in physics.

title: MCP Launch Event
description: A recording from the MCP launch event, marking the start of the program and its mission to connect students with career-facing mentorship.
